title: Slow-cooker chicken and rice soup
subtitle: A restorative broth with long-grain rice and vegetables
excerpt: Chicken thighs and vegetables slow-cooked in stock for four hours, then long-grain rice is added for the final hour until it absorbs the broth and thickens the soup. The chicken shreds into the liquid. Simple, restorative, and ready when someone in the household needs it most.
sourceNotes: Chicken and rice soup is a universal comfort food across many cultures. The British version draws from the broader tradition of restorative broths. The slow cooker version suits the dish's purpose — it is a dish to set going and leave, for days when active cooking is not appealing. Rice is added in the last hour rather than from the start to prevent it from dissolving completely into the broth.

recipe.makeAheadNotes: Cook and refrigerate without the rice. Add fresh rice when reheating.

content.text: Add the rice in the last hour only. Rice in a slow cooker for five hours will dissolve into the broth entirely and produce a thick, starchy porridge rather than a soup with distinct grains. One hour on low is enough for long-grain rice to cook through while keeping some texture.

Add the {{chicken-thigh}}, {{carrot}}, {{celery}}, {{onion}}, {{garlic}}, {{thyme-fresh}}, {{bay-leaves}}, {{sea-salt-fine}}, and {{black-pepper}} to the slow cooker. Pour over the {{stock-chicken}}. Cook on low for 4 hours. Remove the chicken and shred the meat from the bones with two forks. Discard the skin and bones. Return the shredded meat to the pot. Remove the {{thyme-fresh}} sprigs and {{bay-leaves}}. Add the {{long-grain-rice}}, stir, and continue cooking on low for 1 hour, until the rice is tender. Add a squeeze of {{lemon}} juice to finish if using. Taste and adjust seasoning.

items.symptom: Rice dissolved and soup has become thick porridge
items.cause: Rice added too early or cooked longer than 1 hour
items.fix: For next time, add rice in the last 60 minutes only. If this has already happened, the soup is still edible — it is closer to a congee in texture

items.cause: Stock was diluted or low quality
items.fix: Season generously at the end. A squeeze of lemon juice also brightens a flat broth. Use good-quality liquid stock or homemade for this recipe

items.cause: Slow cooker running cool, or rice variety needs longer
items.fix: Switch to high and check after 20 minutes. Long-grain rice should cook in 60 minutes on low, but some cookers run cooler

content.text: Chicken and rice soup is a restorative dish for cold days, illness, and low-effort evenings. The slow cooker version requires nothing after the first ten minutes. The bone-in thighs produce a richer broth than boneless. Serve in deep bowls with crusty bread and a squeeze of lemon.
